hook: I spent $34 and my bathroom cabinet looks like a spa.

aida_breakdown.attention: Under-sink cabinet swings open to reveal total chaos — bottles falling, cords tangled, dead wasted space instantly recognizable
aida_breakdown.interest: Daily morning frustration of digging for products, knocking everything over, starting the day already annoyed
aida_breakdown.desire: Bamboo expandable organizer assembles in 5 minutes, pull-out drawer adds function, final reveal looks like a boutique hotel bathroom
aida_breakdown.action: Product shot beside styled bathroom sink with bio arrow

value_equation.dream_outcome: Bathroom cabinet looks like a professionally organized spa for $34
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Bamboo aesthetic reads premium, pull-out drawer shown on camera, specific 5-minute install time removes doubt
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: No drilling, no tools, expands to fit cabinet width out of the box

scenes.visual_prompt: Under-sink cabinet door swings open revealing chaos: random cleaning bottles, tangled hair dryer cord, products tipped over, zero organization. Harsh bathroom overhead lighting.
Close-up of the mess: expired products crammed together, tangled cord, a bottle tipped on its side. Person's hand reaches in and knocks three things over trying to grab one item.
scenes.voiceover: I couldn't find one thing without pulling everything out.

scenes.visual_prompt: Morning routine: person rushing, opens cabinet, something falls to the floor, they visibly sigh. Wall clock shows 7:15 AM. Real, relatable frustration.
scenes.voiceover: I was done with this every single morning.

scenes.visual_prompt: Amazon box opened on bathroom floor. Bamboo expandable organizer unboxed. Person reads packaging, notices no tools required callout, looks genuinely pleased.
scenes.voiceover: Assembled in 5 minutes. No tools. One Amazon box.

scenes.visual_prompt: Hands expanding the bamboo frame to fit the cabinet width, sliding the pull-out drawer into position, placing products onto the tiered shelves. Clean, satisfying motion.
scenes.voiceover: The pull-out drawer was the thing I didn't know I needed.

scenes.visual_prompt: Final reveal: under-sink cabinet fully organized. Bamboo tiers with cleaning supplies, small labeled bins, pull-out drawer with cotton rounds. Everything visible. Looks like a boutique hotel bathroom.
scenes.voiceover: Now it looks like I hired a professional organizer.

scenes.visual_prompt: Clean product shot of the bamboo organizer beside a styled bathroom sink with neutral accessories. Arrow pointing upward. Link in bio overlay.

caption:
I spent $34 and my bathroom cabinet looks like a spa.

Before: bottles falling out every morning, tangled cords, couldn't find anything without pulling the whole thing apart.

After: bamboo tiered shelves, pull-out drawer, everything visible and accessible. Took 5 minutes. No tools. One Amazon box.

I was skeptical bamboo could look this good under a sink. I was wrong.

Link in bio.

#bathroomorganization #undersinkstorage #springcleaning2026 #homeorganization #bambooorganizer #cabinetorganizer #cleaningtiktok

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Bamboo expandable under-sink organizer with pull-out drawer
